summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tax Hold filter, Admin Notes, and Notes filter features. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@ecommbx.io
Backend: Admin Users List includes has_tax_hold field
Backend: Admin Users List includes admin_notes field
Backend: Admin can update user notes via PATCH /admin/users/{id}/notes
Backend: Admin can place tax hold via POST /admin/users/{id}/tax-hold
Backend: Admin can remove tax hold via DELETE /admin/users/{id}/tax-hold
Backend: Tax hold status reflected in users list
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: 5 filter dropdowns present (Search, Status, Role, Tax Hold, Notes)
Frontend: Tax Hold filter working (filters to 10 users with tax hold)
Frontend: Notes filter working (filters to 2 users with notes)
Frontend: Flags column present in users table
Frontend: TAX badges visible in Flags column (10 badges found)
Frontend: Notes badges visible in Flags column (6 badges found)
Frontend: Admin Notes section present in user details
Frontend: Edit notes button working
Frontend: Notes textarea accepts input
Frontend: Save notes button working
Frontend: Notes persist after save
Frontend: Password visibility toggle working (shows/hides password)
Frontend: Delete user button present and enabled
Frontend: All admin tabs accessible (KYC, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers, Support)
